description: Same-timestep dropped-connection label recovery from full current QoS/QoE variables. This is an upper-bound internal-consistency task, not a deployment prediction task.
exclude_columns: User_ID; Session_ID; Timestamp; Synthetic_Latitude; Synthetic_Longitude; Tower_ID; Dropped_Connection; Drop_t_plus_1; Video_Quality_Label; Anomalous; Offered_Downlink_Mbps; Offered_Upload_Mbps

description: One-step-ahead dropped-connection prediction using current-row QoS/QoE variables, while excluding the current and future drop labels.
exclude_columns: User_ID; Session_ID; Timestamp; Synthetic_Latitude; Synthetic_Longitude; Tower_ID; Dropped_Connection; Drop_t_plus_1; Video_Quality_Label; Anomalous; Offered_Downlink_Mbps; Offered_Upload_Mbps

description: Leakage-controlled one-step-ahead dropped-connection prediction using only session, scenario, device, application, and temporal context variables available before QoS outcomes.
include_columns: Hour; Day_of_Week; Is_Weekend; Deployment_Area; Area_Type; Network_Type; UE_Profile; UE_Capability_Class; Operator_Profile; Weather; Movement_Speed; App_Type; Is_Indoor; Temperature_C; Activity_Factor; Connected_Duration_min
